notes:
When I first got my Steam Deck I installed the game to my SD card and it ran mostly without issues, with the occasional lag spike.

Now I wanted to mess around with settings some more and switched back to the SD card with the game installed and not only did it go through the initial setup again it also made me sign into my Microsoft Account again, sadly that's as far as I've gotten this time as either it straight up crashes or doesn't recognize my sign-in attempt.
